title: Fix Ray Infotech logo spelling/branding

requirements.text: Regenerate the Ray Infotech branded logo image ensuring the company name is spelled correctly as 'Ray Infotech' with no typos or character errors, and update frontend/public/assets/generated/ray-infotech-logo.png with the corrected image.
acceptanceCriteria: The logo image displays the brand name as exactly 'Ray Infotech' with correct spelling
All characters in the logo text are clearly legible and correctly formed
The updated logo is rendered in the hero section of the HomePage at /assets/generated/ray-infotech-logo.png
The logo maintains the deep navy and gold color palette consistent with the existing theme

constraints: Do not change the backend schema or any backend logic
Do not alter any immutable frontend paths (hooks, main.tsx, UI components)
nonGoals: Changing the logo design style or color palette
Modifying any other pages or components beyond the logo image

edits: Fix the brand name text spelling so it reads exactly 'Ray Infotech' with correct lettering, maintaining the deep navy and gold professional style (ray-infotech-logo.png > ray-infotech-logo.dim_400x400.png)
